node.statement: FIB-BRAID-001: For the two-dimensional Fibonacci braid matrices sourced from the local KZ/Fibonacci paper, let B12(q)=diag(q^2,-q) and let B23(c,q,s)=c [[-1, q s], [q s, q^2]]. If c(q+1)=q and q s^2=q^2+q+1, then B12 B23 B12 = B23 B12 B23. The sourced specialisation is q=exp(-2*pi*i/5), phi=(1+sqrt(5))/2, s=sqrt(phi), and c=q/(q+1), matching the displayed B12, B23, phi relation, and braid relation in the local paper. This formalises only the finite 2x2 matrix algebra; it does not construct categorical braidings, neighboring exchange maps on Q^tensor N, braid group representations, conformal blocks, or analytic monodromy.
